summary: P0 Bug Fixes VERIFIED: All 10 tests passed. Intelligence Score now correctly includes inline conversation_memories (conversation_learning=5.5 > 0). Pillar Detection now correctly uses word boundary checking - 'Lola needs a haircut' returns 'care' (not 'travel'), 'Book an Ola cab' returns 'travel' correctly.

intelligence_score_inline_memories.description: Added inline conversation_memories fallback from pet document

pillar_detection_word_boundary.description: Added word boundary checking for short keywords (ola, cab, car, fly, etc.)
pillar_detection_word_boundary.verification: 'Lola' no longer matches 'ola' keyword, but standalone 'Ola' does

critical_code_review_comments: Intelligence score inline memories fix is well-implemented - converts inline format to match expected format
Word boundary checking uses regex with \b for short keywords in WORD_BOUNDARY_KEYWORDS set
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fixes verified. Intelligence score now includes inline conversation_memories (line 91-102 in intelligence_score.py). Pillar detection uses word boundary checking for short keywords like 'ola', 'cab', 'car' (lines 6028-6038 in mira_routes.py).
